semantic.role: Define the structural and narrative role of the .spine directory within the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Summarize the purpose and function of the .spine directory.
Define the maintenance scope and responsibilities for the .spine directory.
outOfScope: Detailed implementation of mirror system components.
Specific configuration or content of files within the .spine directory.

English.purpose: This document defines the role and responsibilities of the .spine directory, which serves as the central configuration and metadata hub for the ArchSpine mirror system.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for project maintainers and AI agents who need to understand the structural purpose and maintenance boundaries of the .spine directory within the ArchSpine project.
key_takeaways: The .spine directory is the core structural element of the ArchSpine system.
This document outlines what the directory is responsible for and what is out of scope.
It provides a clear boundary for maintenance and development efforts.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 .spine 目录的角色和职责，该目录是 ArchSpine 镜像系统的核心配置和元数据中心。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向项目维护者和 AI 代理，帮助他们理解 ArchSpine 项目中 .spine 目录的结构性目的和维护边界。
key_takeaways: .spine 目录是 ArchSpine 系统的核心结构元素。
本文档明确了该目录的职责范围以及不属于其职责的内容。
它为维护和开发工作提供了清晰的边界。
